_comment: Maps the unified /sutra:* surface to members + bridge hooks. Tier-1 commands are hand-tuned composed flows (a member step wrapped in recall/graph/sync/loop/capture bridges). Everything else in a member's surface is reachable via /sutra:do (the general agent routes it) or the member's own namespace (/code_assist:*, /sb:*). This keeps the canonical composed surface maintainable instead of 81 rigid stubs.

do.note: catch-all — routes any request across the pack

recall.note: fused recall: code_assist base + sb vault

capture.note: capture a lesson + record loop event

passthrough.note: All other member capabilities — journal, plan, debug, adr, release, onboard, structure, refactor, secure, scan, github, track, notify, test, format, graph (code_assist); kanban, tasks, topic, search, connect, distill, emerge, health, decision (sb) — are reachable via /sutra:do or the member's own /<member>:<command>. /sutra:do composes bridges around them automatically.
